name: mujica
description: AI-native robot development harness built on MuJoCo

scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p packages/mujica-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/mujica-studio/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/mujica-cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test:py: PYTHONPATH=runtime/src uv run --project runtime python -m unittest discover -s runtime/tests -v
scripts.test: bun run typecheck && bun run test:ts && bun run test:py
